rag_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure type consistency in binary expressions; left and right sides must be of the same type.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers within the same annex for AGREE expressions.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must maintain type safety and avoid unresolved references.
Assignments in implementation scope should target existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
Guarantee statements in component type annexes should relate visible inputs to visible outputs.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the input AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Constants and equations in AGREE must use scalar types: int, real, bool.
anti_patterns: Do not write guarantee statements in implementation scope; use component type annexes for output dependency contracts.
Do not introduce type mismatches in binary expressions; ensure left and right sides match in type.
